title: HF 943 Prohibiting Eminent Domain on Agricultural Land for CO2 Pipeline Projects Passes Iowa House
content: HF 943 was passed in the Iowa House of Representatives with 82 yeas and 12 nays. The bill introduced at HSB 287 prohibits the use of the eminent domain argument on agricultural land for CO2 pipeline projects which it defines as "hazardous liquid pipelines for the transportation or transmission of liquefied carbon dioxide". SF 92 was introduced in the Iowa Senate with the same goal and is pending a scheduled hearing.
author: Analysts Account
